task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct subject for the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field labeled 'Subject' containing 'Pilot Status Sync' in the SuiteCRM meeting creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the start date to 03/11/2026 and time to 10:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Start Date field showing '03/11/2026' (or equivalent format like '2026-03-11') and a Start Time field showing '10:00 AM' or '10:00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent linked the meeting to the Account 'Apex Distributors'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Related To' dropdown is set to 'Account' and the adjacent text field contains 'Apex Distributors'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A description text area containing the text 'Weekly sync to review pilot metrics and address any operational blockers.'

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the meeting to repeat weekly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Repeat Type' dropdown or selection set to 'Weekly'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the recurrence end date to 04/01/2026.
Verify the agent saved the meeting successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or the meeting details view showing the saved 'Pilot Status Sync' meeting with the configured details, indicating the save button was clicked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SuiteCRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the form fields step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of form fields being filled out and dropdowns being interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual SuiteCRM application fields, not a notepad, text editor, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Subject: 'Pilot Status Sync'. Expected Account: 'Apex Distributors'. Expected Repeat Type: 'Weekly'. Expected Repeat Until: '2026-04-01' (or 04/01/2026).
